justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'next Wednesday' as June 3rd, but initially searched a wider time window than the user's 'around 9 AM' preference.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed an alternative time on the same day when the initial preference was unavailable, and then offered a new day when the user requested it.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, booking the appointment in just four turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was mostly positive, with the agent providing clear and concise responses, though the initial time offered was a bit off the user's preference.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by offering an alternative time on the same day and then a new day when the user expressed dissatisfaction with the first alternative, maintaining context throughout.
